PTR_AP.Settings.AutoDetect.Name: Auto-detect charge frequencies
PTR_AP.Settings.AutoDetect.Hint: Automatically creates charge tracking from item frequency text such as Scene x2, Daily x3, Scene, or Daily.
PTR_AP.Settings.ClampAp.Name: Clamp unusable AP
PTR_AP.Settings.ClampAp.Hint: Warns and clamps Action Points when an update would exceed the usable AP after Bind and Drain.
PTR_AP.Notify.ApClamped: {name} can only use {usable} AP after Bind and Drain.
